comment: Judgment-call seeds for admin-area ingestion (A7, owner directive). Each row maps a country/level to the Wikidata class QID whose instances are that country's admin areas, and the places.kind they should be stored as. Loaded through shared/utils/bootstrapGuard (10MB hard cap) into ncdb's admin_class_map table; ingestion reads verified rows only. Evidence fields record how each QID was validated — keep them honest.

classes.label: council area of Scotland
classes.evidence: 35 P31 instances probed 2026-07-18 (32 current + historical; QID dedupe handles)

classes.label: administrative territorial entity of Northern Ireland
classes.evidence: 12 P31 instances probed 2026-07-18 via Antrim and Newtownabbey's own P31. subclassWalk=0: this is an UMBRELLA class — its P279* walk over-matched 60 rows (historical counties etc.); direct P31 only.

classes.label: Landkreis (rural district of Germany)
classes.evidence: P279* walk yields 639 in DE (history included); the currentOnly filter (FILTER NOT EXISTS P576 dissolution) yields 295 — the real current Landkreis count. Auto-discovery missed this umbrella (it ranked leaf per-Land classes); reviewed + seeded 2026-07-19. Covers Landkreise only, not kreisfreie Städte (Q22865, separate future class).
